title: Safety Supplier Qualified Event
description: Emitted when a supplier is qualified in the safety system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

supplier_id.description: Unique identifier of the qualified supplier.

qualification_type.description: Type of qualification awarded (e.g., safety_compliance, quality_certified, approved_vendor).

certified_body.description: Name or identifier of the certifying body that issued the qualification.

expiry_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the qualification expires.

supplier_name.description: Full name of the qualified supplier.

qualification_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the qualification was granted.

qualified_by.description: Identifier of the user or system that performed the qualification.

scope.description: Scope or coverage description of the supplier qualification.

status.description: Current status of the supplier qualification.
